mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate below 2.5% signals monetary easing that reduces the discount rate applied to equity valuations, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days as investors rotate into equities.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns following FEDFUNDS declines are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A month-over-month increase in the unemployment rate exceeding 0.3 percentage points signals deteriorating labor market conditions that reduce consumer confidence and corporate earnings expectations, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60-day returns in > 55% of triggered instances despite unemployment spike, or Rank IC < 0.04 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A joint contraction in retail sales (RSAFS) and housing starts (HOUST) signals weakening aggregate demand that reduces corporate revenue expectations and equity valuations, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS and HOUST both decline > 2% month-over-month
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20-day returns in > 60% of dual-contraction triggered instances, or interaction term coefficient is not statistically significant (p > 0.10) in logistic regression over 5-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in industrial production (INDPRO) above 109.0 signals robust supply-side capacity utilization that supports corporate profit margins and earnings growth, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days as investors reprrice growth expectations upward.
regime_hint: mid-to-late cycle expansion with strong supply conditions
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns following INDPRO > 109.0 are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05), or Rank IC < 0.02 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A month-over-month increase in nonfarm payroll employment (PAYEMS) exceeding 200,000 persons combined with a stable or declining unemployment rate signals strong labor market momentum that supports consumer spending and corporate earnings, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS increases > 200k and UNRATE remains flat or declines
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20-day returns in > 50% of triggered instances, or interaction term is not statistically significant (p > 0.10) in logistic regression over 4-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: When the federal funds rate exceeds 3.5% and inflation (CPIAUCSL) remains elevated above 260.0, the central bank is in restrictive monetary policy stance that compresses equity valuations through higher discount rates and reduced earnings growth expectations, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
regime_hint: monetary tightening cycle with persistent inflation
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60-day returns in > 55% of dual-trigger instances, or interaction coefficient is not statistically significant (p > 0.10) in logistic regression over 3-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: A quarter-over-quarter decline in real GDP (GDPC1) below the prior quarter signals economic contraction that reduces corporate earnings and equity valuations, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days as investors anticipate recession-driven profit compression.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60-day returns in > 50% of quarters following GDPC1 decline, or Rank IC < 0.05 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A month-over-month increase in housing starts (HOUST) exceeding 1,250 thousand units signals robust residential investment demand that supports construction employment, consumer wealth effects, and durable goods spending, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
regime_hint: any regime with strong housing demand
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns following HOUST > 1250 are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05), or Rank IC < 0.02 over any 2-year rolling window.
